command: echo '=== EA Logs (latest) ===' && EALOG=$(ls -t '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/'*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$EALOG" ]; then echo "Log: $EALOG" && wc -l "$EALOG" && tail -60 "$EALOG" | tr -d '\0'; else echo 'No EA log found'; fi && echo '=== Terminal Logs (latest) ===' && TLOG=$(ls -t '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/logs/'*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -n "$TLOG" ]; then echo "Log: $TLOG" && tail -30 "$TLOG" | tr -d '\0'; else echo 'No terminal log found'; fi && echo '=== .ex5 details ===' && ls -la '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/' 2>&1 && echo '=== Process check ===' && ps aux | grep -i 'terminal64\|wine' | grep -v grep
